title: U.S. court bars OpenAI from using ‘Cameo’
description: OpenAI has renamed its feature in Sora from "Cameo" to "Characters."

title: Intellexa’s Predator spyware used to hack iPhone of journalist in Angola, research says
description: Amnesty International says it found evidence that a government customer of Intellexa, a sanctioned surveillance vendor, used its Predator spyware against a prominent journalist in Angola.

title: Apple is reportedly cooking up a trio of AI wearables
description: As the AI hardware space heats up, the iPhone maker has multiple smart products in development.

title: Thrive raises $10B for new fund, its largest yet
description: Thrive Capital just raised $10 billion for its new fund -- nearly double the size of its last fund.

title: Mistral AI buys Koyeb in first acquisition to back its cloud ambitions
description: Mistral AI has agreed to buy Koyeb, a Paris-based startup that simplifies AI app deployment at scale and manages the infrastructure behind it.

title: SpaceX vets raise $50M Series A for data center links
description: Mesh aims to mass-produce optical transceivers for AI data centers.

title: Running AI models is turning into a memory game
description: When we talk about the cost of AI infrastructure, the focus is usually on Nvidia and GPUs -- but memory is an increasingly important part of the picture.

title: European Parliament blocks AI on lawmakers’ devices, citing security risks
description: EU lawmakers found their government-issued devices were blocked from using the baked-in AI tools, amid fears that sensitive information could turn up on the U.S. servers of AI companies.

title: WordPress.com adds an AI Assistant that can edit, adjust styles, create images, and more
description: The feature is designed to work inside the website to understand its content and layout, allowing site owners to make changes with natural language commands. The WordPress AI assistant doesn't need precisely tailored prompts, either.

title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

title: Apple Podcasts is getting an enhanced video experience this spring
description: By bringing an enhanced video podcast viewing experience to its app, Apple is aiming to keep users from turning to rival platforms to watch their favorite shows.

title: Here are the 17 US-based AI companies that have raised $100M or more in 2026
description: Three U.S.-based AI companies raised rounds larger than $1 billion so far in 2026, with 14 others raising rounds of $100 million or more.

title: India bids to attract over $200B in AI infrastructure investment by 2028
description: India is ramping up shared AI compute, adding 20,000 GPUs as part of a broader push to attract global AI investment.

title: Perplexity joins anti-ad camp as AI companies battle over trust and revenue
Meta’s new deal with Nvidia buys up millions of AI chips
Stephen Colbert says CBS banned him from airing this James Talarico interview
Google’s AI search results will make links more obvious
Here are the best Apple Watch deals available right now
